records.ety: [L. excoriare; ex out + corium hide. cf. Scourge; see Cuirass.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Excoriated (?); p. pr. & vb. n. excoriating (?).]

defs: To strip or wear off the skin of; to abrade; to gall; to break and remove the cuticle of, in any manner, as by rubbing, beating, or by the action of acrid substances.
